[SQL: SELECT p.supplier_name, ROUND(SUM(fa.actual_amount), 2) AS total_refund_amount

context.user_query: 上个月物流破损退款最高的Top3供应商
context.sql_query:
SELECT 
    dp.supplier_id,
    ds.supplier_name,
    ROUND(SUM(fo.actual_amount), 2) AS total_refund_amount
FROM fact_after_sales fas
JOIN fact_orders fo ON fas.order_id = fo.order_id
JOIN dim_products dp ON fo.product_id = dp.product_id
JOIN dim_suppliers ds ON dp.supplier_id = ds.supplier_id
WHERE fas.damage_type = '物流破损'
  AND fas.handle_result = '退款'
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', fas.created_at) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', '-1 month')
GROUP BY dp.supplier_id, ds.supplier_name
ORDER BY total_refund
